---
title: "Agricultural Geography"
subtitle: "Spatial patterns of agriculture, crop systems, land use, and food security."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---





Welcome to the **Agricultural Geography** module of Geography OpenCourseWare. This course examines the spatial organization of agriculture — including farming systems, crop distribution, land use patterns, agricultural revolutions, and contemporary challenges of food security.

---

## UGC NET Syllabus

* **Land capability classification and Land Use Planning.**
* **Cropping Pattern: Methods of delineating crop combination regions (Weaver, Doi and Rafiullah), Crop diversification.**
* **Von Thunen’s Model of Land Use Planning.**
* **Measurement and Determinants of Agricultural Productivity, Regional variations in Agricultural Productivity.**
* **Agricultural Systems of the World.**

---

{{< include agricultural-geography/agricultural-regionalisation.md >}}

{{< include agricultural-geography/agricultural-revolutions.md >}}

{{< include agricultural-geography/agricultural-systems-of-the-world.md >}}

{{< include agricultural-geography/agro-and-social-forestry.md >}}

{{< include agricultural-geography/agro-climatic-zones.md >}}

{{< include agricultural-geography/agro-ecological-regions.md >}}

{{< include agricultural-geography/course-content.md >}}

{{< include agricultural-geography/crop-combinations-and-diversification.md >}}

{{< include agricultural-geography/cropping-pattern-agricultural-productivity-agricultural-intensity-crop-combination-land-capability.md >}}

{{< include agricultural-geography/delimitation-of-agricultural-regions.md >}}

{{< include agricultural-geography/food-security-contemporary-issues.md >}}

{{< include agricultural-geography/fundamentals-of-agricultural-geography.md >}}

{{< include agricultural-geography/green-revolution-and-its-socio-economic-and-ecological-implications.md >}}

{{< include agricultural-geography/infrastructure-irrigation-seeds-fertilizers-power.md >}}

{{< include agricultural-geography/institutional-factors.md >}}

{{< include agricultural-geography/land-holdings-land-tenure-and-land-reforms.md >}}

{{< include agricultural-geography/land-use-land-tenure.md >}}

{{< include agricultural-geography/livestock-resources-and-white-revolution.md >}}

{{< include agricultural-geography/major-crops-distribution.md >}}

{{< include agricultural-geography/major-industries-and-industrial-regions.md >}}

{{< include agricultural-geography/measurement-of-agricultural-productivity-and-efficiency.md >}}

{{< include agricultural-geography/mineral-and-power-resources.md >}}

{{< include agricultural-geography/population-distribution-and-growth.md >}}

{{< include agricultural-geography/regional-disparities-in-social-and-economic-development.md >}}

{{< include agricultural-geography/settlement-patterns.md >}}

{{< include agricultural-geography/significance-of-dry-farming.md >}}

{{< include agricultural-geography/types-of-farming.md >}}

{{< include agricultural-geography/von-thunens-model.md >}}
